summary: Fair‑quality audience recording of an inspired August ’91 Shoreline show with a standout Built to Last performance
review: The tape captures the August 1991 Shoreline run from an AUD source; reviewers note the soundboard feed sounds lifeless, giving the recording a fair technical quality. Musically the concert is praised for its creative setlists and an especially inspired second‑set featuring a memorable Built to Last moment, despite onstage tension between Bobby and Bruce.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers gave 4‑star ratings and highlighted an excellent show with strong second‑set moments; the recording is only mildly criticized for being lifeless, keeping the overall score in the high‑four range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience (AUD) source captures crowd reaction well but the soundboard feed is described as lifeless and lacking clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Creative setlists with only one repeat song during the run; a highly inspired second set that many reviewers cite as some of the best music of the Shoreline shows.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Caught in the middle of Bobby and Bruce's onstage argument after Built to Last.
band_member_comments.Bob: Involved in a heated exchange with drummer Bruce following Built to Last, leading to crowd cheers.
band_member_comments.Drums: Bruce (drummer) continued playing past the song’s ending while being verbally challenged by Bobby.
